3077120.name: A Dwarves Day
3077120.description: A Dwarves Day is a 2D adventure game with platformer-style gameplay. You play as a dwarf who finds himself tricked by greed into tumbling down a treacherous hole. What's the problem? Dwarves love holes, right? This hole goes deeper and deeper and gets more and more dangerous for our dwarf. The stage is one long, continuous journey. You will have checkpoints along the way and a built-in timer and death counter for any speed running enjoyers/enthusiasts. The game has an upbeat, casual style but may also induce rage :)
